parameters.content:
## Weekly Content Planner
Every Sunday at 8 AM (MST), this workflow:
1. Checks the Content Calendar for approved posts already scheduled for next week
2. Asks OpenClaw AI to fill in the missing days with content ideas
3. Adds draft rows for each generated post
4. Sends a Discord message to #approvals so the sister can review the week

The sister spends ~5 min on Sunday reviewing and approving. That's it!

## Runs every Sunday morning
Starts the weekly content planning process at 8 AM Arizona time.

## AI fills in the gaps
OpenClaw creates content for any days that don't already have posts, following the weekly content pillar rotation.
